title: Hornet Removal in Pelham, Westchester | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Pelham, Westchester. Safe, effective nest elimination for $350-$550. Protecting Pelham homes and businesses. Call today!
intro: Pelham residents know that hornets can pose serious threats to families enjoying their yards and historic neighborhoods. Best Pest Control NYC provides professional hornet removal services throughout Pelham, from the tree-lined streets near Pelham Memorial High School to properties along the Hutchinson River Parkway. Our experienced technicians safely eliminate hornet nests and prevent future infestations.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving Westchester communities like Pelham with fast, reliable hornet removal services. Our licensed exterminators use proven techniques and safety equipment to protect your family and pets while completely eliminating dangerous hornet colonies.
localContext: Pelham's mature oak and maple trees, classic Tudor and Colonial homes, and proximity to wooded areas create ideal conditions for hornet nesting. Whether you're in Pelham Manor near Shore Park or in the village center, our team understands the unique pest challenges facing this historic Westchester community.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Pelham?
faqs.answer: We typically respond to Pelham hornet removal requests within 24 hours. Emergency same-day service is often available for nests posing immediate danger, especially during peak season from July through September when hornet activity is highest.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal service?
faqs.answer: Our hornet removal service includes a thorough property inspection, safe nest removal using professional-grade equipment, treatment of the area to prevent re-infestation, and disposal of the nest. Price varies based on nest size, location accessibility, and height requiring specialized equipment.

faqs.question: Are hornet removal treatments safe for my Pelham property and family?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and follow strict safety protocols to protect your family, pets, and landscaping. Our technicians wear protective gear and establish safety perimeters during removal to ensure no one is at risk from defensive hornets.

faqs.question: How can I tell if I have hornets versus wasps or bees in Pelham?
faqs.answer: Hornets are larger than wasps, typically black and white or brown and yellow, and build large, enclosed paper nests often in trees, eaves, or attics. If you see a gray football-shaped nest or aggressive stinging insects around your Pelham property, contact us for professional identification and removal rather than approaching the nest yourself.
